## Summary

Adds `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` env var that cascades through all non-synthesis pipeline phases, enabling task-based model routing to slash OpenAI API costs without degrading evaluation quality.

**Set `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL=gpt-5-mini` in Vercel to cut costs ~70-80%** on the highest-volume phases (80+ chunk evals per novel, seeds, story ledger, polish pass). Synthesis (Pass 3/3b DREAM) stays on `gpt-5.1` where literary quality matters.

## Changes

### New env var routing (`policy.ts`)
- `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` â€” single env var that cascades through all cheap-model resolvers
- `getCanonicalSeedModel()` â€” resolves `EVAL_SEED_MODEL` â†’ `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` â†’ default
- `getCanonicalLedgerModel()` â€” resolves `EVAL_LEDGER_MODEL` â†’ `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` â†’ default
- `getCanonicalPolishModel()` â€” resolves `EVAL_POLISH_MODEL` â†’ `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` â†’ default
- Pass 1/Pass 2 chunk resolvers now include `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` in their cascade chain

### Updated callers
- `semanticSeedGenerator.ts` â†’ uses `getCanonicalSeedModel()`
- `editorialDreamSeedGenerator.ts` â†’ uses `getCanonicalSeedModel()`
- `fullContextStoryLedger.ts` â†’ uses `getCanonicalLedgerModel()`
- `polishPass.ts` â†’ uses `getCanonicalPolishModel()` (was hardcoded `"gpt-5.1"`)

### Token caps
- Added `gpt-5-mini`, `gpt-5-nano`, `gpt-5.4-nano`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.5` to `MODEL_COMPLETION_TOKEN_CAPS`

## Scope

**Touches:** Model selection for seeds, ledger, chunk evals (Pass 1/2), polish pass, token cap table.
**Does NOT touch:** Pass 3 synthesis, Pass 3b DREAM, Pass 3A preflight â€” these stay on `gpt-5.1` for quality.

## Vercel env vars to set

| Env Var | Recommended Value | Effect |
|---------|-------------------|--------|
| `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` | `gpt-5-mini` | Routes seeds, ledger, chunks, polish to gpt-5-mini |
| `EVAL_OPENAI_MODEL` | `gpt-5.1` (already set) | Keeps synthesis quality high |

**Estimated cost reduction:** ~70-80% per evaluation (80+ chunk calls Ă— cheaper model + seeds + ledger + polish).

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- **Quality risk is minimal**: chunk evals (Pass 1/Pass 2) are per-chunk scoring â€” `gpt-5-mini` handles structured JSON output well. Synthesis (where literary quality matters) stays on `gpt-5.1`.
- **Fully backward compatible**: if `EVAL_CHEAP_MODEL` is not set, all phases fall back to `EVAL_OPENAI_MODEL` (current behavior).
- **Granular override**: each phase has its own env var (`EVAL_SEED_MODEL`, `EVAL_LEDGER_MODEL`, etc.) for fine-grained control.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A â€” this directly changes model routing for pipeline phases, but is backward compatible (no behavior change without env var)
